channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Border czar hails a ‘safer’ Minnesota as he says the state’s immigration crackdown is over
item.description: The Trump administration says it is ending its massive immigration crackdown in Minnesota after weeks of angry mass protests, thousands of arrests and two fatal shootings.

item.title: Search for Nancy Guthrie now seeks nearby security videos from the month before she vanished
Grieving families press Congress on aviation safety reforms after midair collision near DC
